scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && esbuild cgtjs/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild cgtjs/game/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --outfile=dist/game.js && esbuild cgtjs/solver/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --outfile=dist/solver.js && esbuild cgtjs/utils/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --outfile=dist/utils.js && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/index.d.ts --project tsconfig.build.json --no-banner cgtjs/index.ts && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/game.d.ts --project tsconfig.build.json --no-banner cgtjs/game/index.ts && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/solver.d.ts --project tsconfig.build.json --no-banner cgtjs/solver/index.ts && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/utils.d.ts --project tsconfig.build.json --no-banner cgtjs/utils/index.ts
